title: Mosaics
description: Adds a variation of mosaics for other types of planks
body:
The mod adds a variation of mosaics to the game for other types of planks, not just bamboo. In Minecraft, there is a mosaic only for bamboo, and for some reason there is no mosaic for other planks, but this mod will fix it.

![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7670ac38e6a4fdba862b6080beef2109d34543ab.png)

The mod is supported even on those versions where there is no mosaic. However, the mod will not add bamboo mosaics, but only for those types of wood that exist on certain versions.
#

<details>
<summary>Mosaics</summary>
  
- Oak
- Spruce
- Birch
- Jungle
- Acacia
- Dark Oak
- Mangrove
- Cherry
- Pale Oak
- Crimson
- Warped

</details>
